blocks.text: Double CL night: Arsenal and Bayern defend, Europe holds its breath

After PSG ended Liverpool's European dream and Atlético edged through on drama, the final two quarter-finals are tonight. Arsenal protect a 1-0 lead; Bayern a 2-1 advantage over Real Madrid. One of these ties will flip.
🎮 LIVE — rain's IEM Rio 2026 CS2 Major campaign in full swing

items: ⛳ Thu — RBC Heritage opens at Hilton Head, Hovland in the field
